read_file.name: read_file
read_file.title: Read File
read_file.description: Reads the contents of a file. Supports text files with line-numbered output and optional line ranges for efficient partial reads.

id.title: Id
id.description: Sets the id of this step

description.title: Description
description.description: Sets the description of this step

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to skip this step during execution.

path.title: Path
path.description: File path relative to the workspace directory to read.

range.title: Range
range.description: One or more line range elements in format 'start-end' (1-based, inclusive). For example: '1-50' or '100-200'. Omit to read the entire file.

write_file.name: write_file
write_file.title: Write File
write_file.description: Writes content to a file. Creates the file and any necessary parent directories if they do not exist. Overwrites the file if it already exists.

id.title: Id
id.description: Sets the id of this step

description.title: Description
description.description: Sets the description of this step

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to skip this step during execution.

path.title: Path
path.description: File path relative to the workspace directory to write to.

content.title: Content
content.description: The full content to write to the file. Must include ALL parts of the file — partial updates are not supported by this tool.

line_count.title: Line Count
line_count.description: Predicted number of lines in the content. Used to detect truncation on large files (100+ lines).

spawn_subagent.name: spawn_subagent
spawn_subagent.title: Spawn Subagent
spawn_subagent.description: Spawns an independent subagent to handle a focused task. The subagent runs in its own isolated context and returns a summary when done.

id.title: Id
id.description: Sets the id of this step

description.title: Description
description.description: Sets the description of this step

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to skip this step during execution.

name.title: Subagent Type
name.description: Type of subagent to spawn. Use 'explore' for read-only codebase investigation (uses explorer model). Use 'general' for full-capability work (default model).

taskDescription.title: Task Description
taskDescription.description: Detailed instructions for the subagent. Be specific about what it should accomplish. The subagent cannot interact with the user — all context must be provided here.

fork_context.title: Fork Context
fork_context.description: When true, passes the parent conversation history into the subagent's initial context. Use when the subagent needs to understand prior decisions or constraints.

ask_followup_question.name: ask_followup_question
ask_followup_question.title: Ask Followup Question
ask_followup_question.description: Asks the user a question to gather additional information. Supports up to four selectable suggestion answers.

id.title: Id
id.description: Sets the id of this step

description.title: Description
description.description: Sets the description of this step

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to skip this step during execution.

question.title: Question
question.description: A clear, specific question to present to the user.

suggestion_a.title: Suggestion A
suggestion_a.description: First selectable answer suggestion. Must be complete and actionable without placeholders.

suggestion_b.title: Suggestion B
suggestion_b.description: Second selectable answer suggestion. Must be complete and actionable without placeholders.

allow_multiple.title: Allow Multiple
allow_multiple.description: When true, allows the user to select multiple suggestions at once.

update_todo_list.name: update_todo_list
update_todo_list.title: Update Todo List
update_todo_list.description: Replaces the todo list with an updated checklist reflecting the current task state. Use [ ] for pending, [-] for in-progress, and [x] for completed items.

id.title: Id
id.description: Sets the id of this step

description.title: Description
description.description: Sets the description of this step

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to skip this step during execution.

todos.title: Todos
todos.description: Markdown-formatted checklist of all tasks. Use [ ] for pending, [-] for in-progress, and [x] for completed. Always provide the full list — the system overwrites the previous one.

use_skill.name: use_skill
use_skill.title: Use Skill
use_skill.description: Activates a skill by name to load its full instructions into context. Only call once per skill per context window.

id.title: Id
id.description: Sets the id of this step

description.title: Description
description.description: Sets the description of this step

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to skip this step during execution.

skill_name.title: Skill Name
skill_name.description: Name of the skill to activate. Only call skills listed in the available skills section. Only activate each skill once per context window.

switch_mode.name: switch_mode
switch_mode.title: Switch Mode
switch_mode.description: Switches to a different Bob mode to access different capabilities and tools. Each mode is optimized for specific types of tasks.

id.title: Id
id.description: Sets the id of this step

description.title: Description
description.description: Sets the description of this step

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to skip this step during execution.

mode_id.title: Mode Id
mode_id.description: The slug (ID) of the mode to switch to. Must match the slug of an available mode definition.

start_subtask.name: start_subtask
start_subtask.title: Start Subtask
start_subtask.description: Creates a new task instance with its own title, instructions, and optional todo list. The subtask runs in an isolated context within the current session.

id.title: Id
id.description: Sets the id of this step

description.title: Description
description.description: Sets the description of this step

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to skip this step during execution.

title.title: Title
title.description: Short display title for the subtask shown in the UI breadcrumbs.

message.title: Message
message.description: Detailed instructions for the subtask. This is the initial user message the subtask will act on.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: The mode ID to use for this subtask (e.g. 'agent', 'plan'). If not provided, defaults to 'agent'.

todos.title: Initial Todos
todos.description: Optional initial todo list in markdown checklist format for the subtask.

execute_command.name: execute_command
execute_command.title: Execute Command
execute_command.description: Executes a CLI command on the system. Use for builds, test runners, git operations, and other system operations that require a shell.

id.title: Id
id.description: Sets the id of this step

description.title: Description
description.description: Sets the description of this step

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Whether to skip this step during execution.

command.title: Command
command.description: The CLI command to execute. Must be valid bash syntax. Chain dependent commands with && and use ; only when earlier failures are acceptable.

cwd.title: Working Directory
cwd.description: Working directory for the command relative to the workspace root. Defaults to the workspace root if not specified.

timeout_seconds.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeout_seconds.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for the command to complete. Defaults to 300s. Set higher only for known slow operations (max 1800s).
